# Pinned versions for reproducibility builds.
#
# Each entry is the exact commit hash or release tag that the trust
# chain depends on. Do NOT edit casually — these pins define what the
# zisk-fv proofs are about. CI verifies the live tree matches.

# ZisK source tree (vendored as git submodule at zisk; cited
# from transpile_* axiom rationales).
zisk-submodule-commit      = 48cf7ccefb5ed62261abf6bfb007b5be8a23c547

# Pilout build inputs (used by docker/Dockerfile.pilout).
# Stock upstream 0xPolygonHermez/zisk at the v0.15.0 release tag
# (commit b3ca745b...). The pil2-compiler / pil2-proofman tags are
# the toolchain versions v0.15.0 was authored against. Earlier
# revisions of this file pinned a personal fork that added a
# `u256_delegation` precompile (visible as the U256Delegation AIR);
# we switched to stock v0.15.0 to validate the reproducibility
# pipeline against unmodified upstream sources.
pilout-zisk-repo           = https://github.com/0xPolygonHermez/zisk.git
pilout-zisk-commit         = b3ca745b80423c8123dc24f19039865a5bc8b074
pil2-compiler-tag          = v0.8.0
pil2-proofman-tag          = v0.15.0

# Sail-Lean toolchain (used by docker/Dockerfile.sail-lean).
# rems-project/sail and riscv/sail-riscv at HEAD on 2025-12-26 06:18 UTC,
# the timestamp at which NethermindEth/sail-riscv-lean cron-regenerated
# commit 81c8c84f. NethermindEth's CI does not pin its upstreams, so we
# pin them here for reproducibility.
sail-commit                = 277470b2ab472af8064e1295be5573845239c96b
sail-riscv-commit          = 04e595954b2af7fa9e18f2519e4ae4bba72b2701
ocaml-version              = 5.2.1

# Resolved Lean dependencies (Lake manifest is the source of truth;
# these are tracked here so a one-shot grep finds them).
lean-rv-commit             = 81c8c84f919b6b565790713e2049a88b88739cda
leanzkcircuit-commit       = 8631b11de51c68288b519e8032019524b84a365f

# Sail-Lean RV64D tree hash (sha256 of sorted *.lean file sha256s).
# Verified by `docker/build-sail-lean.sh`. Update when upstream pins
# (sail-commit, sail-riscv-commit) change.
expected-sail-lean-tree-sha256 = 9a6cd3b7eb80574e31084d13e406ec63fe9334635d297ae87e30f6c3e3340da0

# Pilout AIR-list structural fingerprint (sha256 of `pil-extract --list`).
# Verified by bin/test.sh.
expected-zisk-pilout-fingerprint = 504c8583295f3ccfec28eac70bba4c990cd1bd6679faafb4bed8018e860877bd
